<!-- Keep PRs focused: one bundle of related changes. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? Link the ADR or
     issue if there is one. -->

## How

<!-- Brief notes on the approach. Call out anything non-obvious or any
     alternative you rejected. -->

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior (or noted why not)
- [ ] Journal entry added for non-trivial bundles (`docs/journal/`)

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- UI changes: before/after. Schema changes: migration + impact. -->
